json_data.title: Computational Models of Specific Cognitive Functions
json_data.reason: This topic delves into the computational modeling of individual cognitive processes that form the building blocks of larger cognitive architectures.

json_data.title: Neuro-Symbolic AI
json_data.reason: This advanced area directly tackles the integration of symbolic reasoning with neural networks, building on the challenges discussed in hybrid architectures and deep learning comparisons.

json_data.title: Architectures for Artificial General Intelligence (AGI)
json_data.reason: This represents the cutting edge of cognitive architecture research, focusing on developing comprehensive systems capable of broad, human-like intelligence.
